title: koellia torreyi
intro: Koellia torreyi is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the Koellia torreyi or Torrey's Koellia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. Koellia torreyi is said to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, contributing to its numerous health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and can also be used in the form of capsules, tinctures, or topical creams, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
